basic_details.job_title: NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research (NISER), Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: NISER Bhubaneswar is recruiting 1 Research Associate-I post under ANRF funded project.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 years as on 10-07-2026. Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.
qualification.education_qualification: PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university.

vacancy_details.details: A total of 01 temporary position of Research Associate-I is available under the ANRF funded project.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates should submit their applications via email to [email protected] by 5 PM of 10-07-2026. They need to send the duly filled-in scanned copy of the application form (given in the advertisement), along with scanned copies of all Educational Certificates, experience (if any), complete CV with publication list, and two letters of reference.
For any clarification, please contact Prof. Hirendra Nath Ghosh on the above-mentioned email.
Shortlisted candidates will be intimated for interview in person or through video-conferencing. No TA/DA will be paid.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. It will not confer any right/claim for regular absorption in NISER. Mere possession of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an invitation to the interview. Candidates must submit complete application with all supporting documents. Age relaxation as per Government of India rules. Selected candidate will be appointed initially for ten months.

rows.national_institute_of_science_education_: Ultrafast Charge Carrier Dynamics in Metal Halide Perovskite Heterostructures
Initially ten months (extendable based on performance or till project completion)

content_sections.heading: NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university.
Experience in at least one of the following: (1) Ultrafast spectroscopy techniques and synthesis of heterostructures (2) Optoelectronic device (Solar Cell, Photodetector) Fabrication.
35 years as on 10-07-2026. Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026 is 10 July 2026 up to 5:00 PM. Interested and eligible candidates must send their application form along with all required documents via email before the deadline. Late submissions will not be considered by the institute.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available under NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NISER Bhubaneswar has announced 01 vacancy for the post of Research Associate-I. The position is offered under an ANRF-funded research project in the School of Chemical Sciences. The appointment is temporary and project-based in nature.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD degree in Physics or Chemistry from a recognized university to be eligible for the Research Associate-I post. Applicants with relevant research experience in spectroscopy, heterostructures, or optoelectronic devices will be preferred. The qualification should be completed before the application deadline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years as on 10 July 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per Government of India rules. Applicants should ensure they meet the age criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I post at NISER Bhubaneswar?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly fellowship of ₹58,000 per month. The salary is provided under the ANRF-funded research project and does not include any additional allowances unless specified by the institute. The remuneration is competitive for project-based research positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of shortlisting of applications followed by an interview. The interview may be conducted either in person or through video conferencing depending on the institute's decision. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview round.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for NISER Bhubaneswar Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit their application through email to [email protected]. The application should include the prescribed application form, educational certificates, experience documents, detailed CV, publication list, and two recommendation letters. All documents must be submitted before the closing date.
